title: Machinations
excerpt: A game of beautiful kingdoms and terrible people.
content_html:
A game of beautiful kingdoms and terrible people.

Send agents

Dispatch your pawns across a living map: to watch a rival, claim a seat, or stand quietly near trouble.

Run schemes

Commit plots and decide how much coin and care each deserves. The realm resolves them whether you are watching or not.

Return to a changed world

Hours pass between visits, and your rivals do not wait. Come back to consequences, some of them yours.

Meet the game: take the guided tour →

content_html_zh:
美丽的王国和可怕的人民的游戏。

派代理

在动态地图上派遣你的棋子：观察对手、占据席位，或者静静地站在麻烦附近。

运行方案

提交阴谋并决定每个人应该得到多少金钱和照顾。 无论你是否在看，这个领域都会解决它们。

回到一个改变的世界

两次访问之间要经过几个小时，而您的竞争对手不会等待。 回到后果，其中一些是你的。

认识游戏：跟随导游 →
